chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-167 of 2016. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For orders on office objection at flag.A. For katcha peshi. 16.06.2017. Mr. Sajid Hussain Mahessar Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Aijaz Mustafa Samtio, DDPP. ---------------- Learned DDPP states at the bar that official respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will not cause harassment to the petitioner. In view of such statement this petition stands disposed. J U D G E S Ashfaq
